title: FOOD PANTRIES - 211info
text: SOUTH BENTON RESOURCE CENTER FOOD PANTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry with canned goods, fresh produce, bread, and dairy products. Distributes pet food, diapers, personal care and hygiene products when available. Offers information and referrals to agencies for various assistance. Accepts donations of shelf-stable food, condiments, personal care and hygiene products, diapers, and pet food. 648 Orchard Street Monroe, OR 97456 Eligibility: USDA income guidelines of 300% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Tuesday 10am-noon 3rd Thursday of the month 4pm-6pm 1st, 2nd, 4th, and 5th Thursdays of the month 10am-noon Emergency: Call or email if outside of normal pantry hours Email (541) 745-8759 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 745-8759 Main phone Main phone (541) 745-8759 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Food: Walk in or call for more information Donations: Drop off during pantry hours, call, or email. Visit website for list of needed items. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish printed materials available AREA SERVED: Benton, Lane, and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: . TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on Orchard Street behind Heritage Hall in an old garage with metal sides. Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Comprehensive Information and Referral Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Pet Food Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY MEAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH BENTON RESOURCE CENTER
